implUnits: processor deps.ts wire evaluator into runPlanInWorkspaceTx
result.notes: Realtime hook: planProcessing extension point; append re-eval AFTER buildFeatureUpsert so it reads updated features (§7 step4->5), in SAME workspace-scoped tx (atomic). Realtime path scopes matching to CHANGED profile (AND p.id=$profile), diffs that one profile's match vs its membership rows (not whole-segment rematerialize). Compiler follows scopedQuery precedent: workspace_id structurally always $1, never from AST (invariant #6, highest-value unit). jsonb KEY names bound as params never concatenated (closes field-name injection). Reuse SqlStatement {text,values}. Integration reuse testutil (adminPool, hasDatabaseUrl, skipIf), evaluator service-role bypass -> in-code isolation. Unique workspace UUIDs + file-local event_id namespace (global event_id PK). Whitelist: attributes.* , features.counters.* (::numeric), scalar feature columns. TDD order: compile unit -> diff -> statements -> evaluate+integration -> manual+integration -> processor hook -> batch.

assertions: §8 AST -> exact {text,values}
workspace_id ALWAYS first predicate $1, present even for empty AST
every value is $n (no literal in text); in/not in -> ANY/ALL with array as one param
whitelisted field mapping attributes->>key (key as param), counters->>key::numeric, scalar columns
unknown field THROWS
unknown operator THROWS
injection in field name rejected (whitelist)
injection in value safely parameterized (only in values[])
exists -> IS NOT NULL no extra param
deep nested and/or/not exact text+params balanced parens
comparison ops table-driven
malformed node THROWS no partial SQL
diffMembership: new->entered once, gone->exited once
in both -> neither (idempotent)
empty matched all exited; empty current all entered
duplicates deduped
buildEntered: membership source=evaluator + change_log entered, workspace_id $1
buildExited: delete scoped + change_log exited
membership writes constrained source='evaluator' (never touch manual)
selectActive segments filter workspace+status+kind, EXCLUDE manual
every statement binds workspace_id $1
below predicate -> no match no rows
cross predicate -> exactly one membership(source=evaluator)+one change_log entered
re-eval same state -> no new rows (idempotent)
drop below -> membership removed + one exited
cross-workspace: wsB match never affected by wsA eval; workspace_id=$1 binds wsA
admin pool in-code scoping; unique UUIDs+event_id namespace
in + nested not match real rows end-to-end
enumerate only dynamic_batch active, per-workspace
reuses compileWhere+diff+builders
manual excluded
time-based predicate one entered crossing + one exited back
wsA sweep never touches wsB
re-run unchanged idempotent
profile upsert first, event+feature second (no regression)
segment re-eval appended AFTER feature upsert (reads post-update features)
workspace-scoped, dynamic_realtime only
invoked with changed profile id; no change -> no writes
evaluator skips kind=manual: manual membership unchanged, no change_log
addManualMembers/removeManualMembers workspace-scoped; CSV batch insert
manual member also matching dynamic -> only dynamic(source=evaluator) rows affected
resolveAudience returns members for BOTH manual and dynamic
